title: Production Server Build for an Industrial Control Environment
description: Deployed Windows Server 2022 Datacenter on enterprise hardware for a DeltaV process control environment, including RAID configuration, edition conversion, offline activation, domain controller promotion, and resolving time-sync issues affecting Kerberos authentication.

title: Active Directory Recovery After Network Migration
description: Diagnosed a domain-wide GPO failure traced back to an orphaned policy with a missing SYSVOL folder, and resolved a cascading DNS/replication failure caused by a domain controller IP change in a live OT network.

title: Industrial Network Redesign
description: Designed and documented VLAN segmentation across Hirschmann managed switches in a Hyper-V and DeltaV environment, including dual-VLAN trunk configuration on Hyper-V host virtual NICs.

title: Home Lab: Automation & Orchestration Practice
description: Built a home hyper-converged lab to get hands-on with tooling that doesn't come up in day to day OT/IT work but consistently shows up in infrastructure job requirements. Running Proxmox alongside existing Hyper-V/VMware experience, provisioning Docker workloads with Terraform, and working through Jenkins pipeline fundamentals, backed by completed coursework in each area.
